Independence (Timely, Safely)
84 _35A DSTNC_WLKD_ADMSN_CD (35a) Distance Walked: Admission CHAR 2 A code indicating the distance the patient walked at admission. 00 = Activity does not occur, 01 = Less than 50 feet, 02 = 50 to 149 feet, 03 = 150 feet
85 _35D DSTNC_WLKD_DSCHRG_CD (35d) Distance Walked: Discharge CHAR 2 A code indicating the distance the patient walked at discharge. 00 = Activity does not occur, 01 = Less than 50 feet, 02 = 50 to 149 feet, 03 = 150 feet
86 _36A DSTNC_WC_ADMSN_CD
